extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter won Stage 2 sprint after late crash eliminated yellow jersey GAVIRIA, using patience to overcome uphill drag finish
tactical_patterns: Bora controlled last 30km enabling Sagan positioning, but fragile sprint trains crashed before 2km eliminating Gaviria.
Uphill finish gradient forced sprinters to launch earlier than typical 200m point, rewarding patience over raw speed.
DEMAR's flat tire at 20km didn't prevent final sprint presence, suggesting support car efficiency exceeded expectations.
Alaphilippe present without Gaviria revealed QuickStep maintaining leadout depth even after losing primary sprinter to crash.

rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: Yellow jersey holder crashed sub-2km, exposing vulnerability in technical finishes despite strong form
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: Deliberately waited behind Degenkolb/Demar, exploiting uphill gradient requiring sustained power over pure acceleration
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: neutral: Matched Sagan's wheel but lacked final speed, suggesting capable positioning without winning punch
rider_signals.DEMAR Arnaud: positive: Reached sprint group after 20km mechanical, indicating strong chase capability or weak race pace
rider_signals.GREIPEL Andre: negative: Present in finale but failed to contest sprint, questioning remaining competitive relevance
